note: v0.17 (T7) labeled resolution corpus. Each case feeds the rerank LLM a RECORDED candidate set (what esearch+esummary would return for `<acronym>[Title] AND <disease>`) and the expected answer. Positive cases expect the named trial's primary PMID; collision cases expect null (NONE) because the named trial is NOT in the candidate set for that disease — a wrong pick there is the failure we most want to prevent (a curator-gated feature still benefits from precise candidates). Candidates are hand-curated from public metadata of well-known trials; they are FIXED (recorded) so the eval is deterministic on the API side.
